name: Graves

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: New Destiny
passive.description_source: Innate:  Graves'  basic attacks consume up to 2 shells before needing to reload. The reload speed is reduced based on his  bonus attack speed.

effects.description: Innate - Double Barrel: Graves' basic attacks fire his shotgun to consume ammunition within 2 shells. He will reload over a few seconds immediately after expending all shells or withholding leftover shells for a while. The reload time is reduced by Graves' level and bonus attack speed, and can be interrupted by declaring an attack or casting an ability.

Innate - 12-Gauge: Graves' basic attack sprays 4 pellets in a cone, each colliding with the first enemy unit in their path, dealing 70% : 105.04% (based on level) AD physical damage plus[ 23.31% : 34.98% (based on level) AD additional physical damage ][ about one-third of the damage ]for each subsequent pellet hitting the same target, up to 139.93% : 209.99% (based on level) AD total physical damage against a single target. Pellets deal 25% reduced damage against structures.

Critical strikes spray 6 pellets over a 25% wider cone, with each pellet dealing[ (50% + 15%) increased damage, ][ increased damage equal to 50% bonus critical damage, ]resulting in[ 199.976% (+ 19.998%) total damage ][ 279.84% : 419.93% (based on level) (+ 27.98% : 41.99% (based on level)) AD total physical damage ]if all pellets hit a single target.
Pellets apply life steal. Only the first pellet to hit each enemy applies on-hit effects.
Innate - Buckshot: Non-champion units hit by more than one pellet are knocked back, though not through terrain.

passive.description: Innate - Double Barrel: Graves' basic attacks fire his shotgun to consume ammunition within 2 shells. He will reload over a few seconds immediately after expending all shells or withholding leftover shells for a while. The reload time is reduced by Graves' level and bonus attack speed, and can be interrupted by declaring an attack or casting an ability.

basic_ability_1.name: End of the Line
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Graves fires an explosive shell that deals physical damage to enemies it passes through.

effects.description: Physical Damage
effects.context_notes: Active: Graves fires a round in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies it passes through and leaves behind a powder trail.

effects.description: Physical Damage
Total Physical Damage
Enemies can only be hit once per pass.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Graves fires a round in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies it passes through and leaves behind a powder trail.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Spell shields can only block one instance of the ability's damage.

basic_ability_2.name: Smoke Screen
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Graves fires a smoke canister at the target location that creates a cloud of smoke upon impact, dealing magic damage and  slowing nearby enemies.

effects.description: Magic Damage
effects.context_notes: Active: Graves fires a smoke canister at the target location that upon impact deals magic damage to enemies within the area and slows them by 50% for 0.5 seconds.

effects.description: The canister creates a cloud of smoke for 4 seconds that applies nearsight of outside the area to all enemies within every 0.25 seconds, reducing their sight radius relative to the center.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Graves fires a smoke canister at the target location that upon impact deals magic damage to enemies within the area and slows them by 50% for 0.5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Smoke Screen will nearsight untargetable units.

basic_ability_3.name: Quickdraw
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Graves  dashes in the target direction and reloads 1 shell. He also gains a  stack of True Grit, doubled if he dashed toward an enemy  champion.

effects.description: Active: Graves dashes to the target location, reloading one shell while generating a stack of True Grit for 4 seconds, stacking up to 8 times. Dashing towards an enemy champion generates 2 stacks of True Grit.
Quickdraw's current cooldown is reduced by 0.5 seconds for every pellet impacting an enemy.
Bonus Armor
effects.context_notes: True Grit: For each stack, Graves gains bonus armor, and bonus magic resistance equal to 50% of that amount.

effects.description: Maximum Bonus Armor
effects.context_notes: True Grit: For each stack, Graves gains bonus armor, and bonus magic resistance equal to 50% of that amount.

effects.description: Bonus Magic Resistance
effects.context_notes: True Grit: For each stack, Graves gains bonus armor, and bonus magic resistance equal to 50% of that amount.

effects.description: Maximum Bonus MR
effects.context_notes: True Grit: For each stack, Graves gains bonus armor, and bonus magic resistance equal to 50% of that amount.

effects.description: Quickdraw resets Graves' basic attack timer.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Graves dashes to the target location, reloading one shell while generating a stack of True Grit for 4 seconds, stacking up to 8 times. Dashing towards an enemy champion generates 2 stacks of True Grit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): If Graves dashes while reloading, he can cast any of his abilities during the dash.

ultimate.name: Collateral Damage
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Graves  recoils backward and fires an explosive shell in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies it passes through.

effects.description: Physical Damage
effects.context_notes: Active: Graves fires an explosive shell in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit and causes him to recoil 400 units in the opposite direction.

effects.description: Reduced Damage
effects.context_notes: Upon hitting an enemy champion or reaching the end of its range, the shell explodes in a cone to deal reduced damage to additional enemies.

ultimate.description: Active: Graves fires an explosive shell in the target direction that deals physical damage to enemies hit and causes him to recoil 400 units in the opposite direction.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Applies spell damage to the target hit by the shell (including to non-champions struck before exploding(bug)) and area damage to targets within the explosion cone.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
